name: Retaliation After Filing Injury Claim Bountiful UT

mainEntity.name: Can I get fired for filing work injury claim in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Can I get fired for filing work injury claim in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: No Utah law prohibits retaliation for workers comp claims. File complaint with Labor Commission if terminated.[9]

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful employers cannot fire for legitimate on-the-job claims; protected activity. Suspicious timing proves retaliation—wrongful termination suit possible alongside comp. Document everything; retaliation claims recover lost wages punitive damages.[9]

description: No Utah law prohibits retaliation for workers comp claims. File complaint with Labor Commission if terminated.[9]
